summary: Iteration 2 redesign verified end-to-end. Backend pytest still 24/24 passing (no API changes). Frontend redesign fully validated: multi-page nav routing (Home/Services/About/Testimonials/Contact via NavLink with URL changes preserving SiteLayout), hero motto 'Beautiful smiles are created here' + sub-headline 'Results from the first visit' (data-testid=hero-subhead), hero WhatsApp CTA links to https://wa.me/18762068929 with target=_blank, MarqueeStrip contains 'We don't treat teeth, we treat people', PhilosophyBanner shows the philosophy quote, Embla TestimonialsCarousel renders with prev/next advancing the active dot (w-10 active class), AboutPage shows Dr. Yanahitza Baró + '20+' badge + 'Cuban' + 'prosthetic rehabilitation' + philosophy quote, ServicesPage renders exactly 9 cards with the new SERVICES_LIST names, ContactPage shows real phone (876) 728-5735, WhatsApp (876) 206-8929, email bedentalparadise@gmail.com, opening hours, contact-form submits successfully (sonner toast appears), BookPage form submits with 'Crown & Bridge' service + calendar date + time and reaches booking-success state ('You're on the list!' + green toast 'Appointment request sent!'), WhatsApp FAB visible on every public page linking to wa.me/18762068929, new logo URL (contains k715mfhv) loads in nav/footer/admin, /admin/login still authenticates (admin@bedentalparadise.com / Paradise@2026) and admin-logout-btn returns to /admin/login.
critical_code_review_comments: Public pages fire /api/auth/me on mount (AuthProvider) which returns 401 for unauthenticated visitors and pollutes the browser console; consider gating /api/auth/me to only run on /admin* routes or swallow 401 silently to keep DevTools clean.
Hero floating logo has no alt + key attribute warning risk; minor a11y nit (motion.img with alt='Be Dental Paradise' present, fine).
Embla auto-rotate interval of 5500ms is fine, but pause-on-hover would improve UX.
Mocked/manual payments behavior unchanged from iteration 1 — admin records by hand (MOCKED, no live gateway) — already documented.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_FE_User contact message, TEST_FE_Book appointment (Crown & Bridge), and pytest TEST_ prefixed records (cleaned up by test teardown for appointments/payments).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 2 multi-page redesign verified. Key new selectors: nav-link-{home|services|about|testimonials|contact}, hero-whatsapp-btn, hero-subhead, marquee-strip, philosophy-banner, testimonials-carousel, testimonials-prev/next, testimonial-dot-{0..4}, service-card-{key}, page-hero, whatsapp-fab. Booking date trigger uses data-testid=booking-date-trigger (NOT booking-date — that prefix only on booking-name/email/phone/service/time/notes/submit-btn). Backend unchanged from iter 1; pytest at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py.
